funFacts: Modern passenger trains are powered by electricity or diesel engines, transporting cargo and commuters efficiently over long distances.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using acrylic or light watercolors.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
